tasks.label: Start emulator, build, install, and launch debug APK
args: export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/home/eduardo/Android/Sdk && export ANDROID_AVD_HOME=${ANDROID_AVD_HOME:-$HOME/.android/avd} && if ! "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" devices | grep -q '^emulator-[0-9][0-9][0-9][0-9][[:space:]]'; then nohup "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/emulator/emulator" @Pixel_API_34 -no-snapshot -no-boot-anim >/tmp/zowi-emulator.log 2>&1 & fi && ./gradlew assembleDebug && "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" wait-for-device && until [[ "$("$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" == "1" ]]; do echo 'Waiting for Android boot...'; sleep 2; done && until "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" shell service list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'package:'; do echo 'Waiting for package manager...'; sleep 2; done && "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" shell monkey -p com.bq.zowi -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: Build, install, and launch debug APK (reuse running emulator)
args: export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/home/eduardo/Android/Sdk && ./gradlew assembleDebug && "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" wait-for-device && until [[ "$("$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\r')" == "1" ]]; do echo 'Waiting for Android boot...'; sleep 2; done && until "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" shell service list 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'package:'; do echo 'Waiting for package manager...'; sleep 2; done && "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" install -r app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk && "$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools/adb" shell monkey -p com.bq.zowi -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
